description:
Monitor your Apache JMeter load test in real time with InfluxDB and Grafana.
Get overall summary, errors details and particular transaction response times.

targets.query: SELECT sum("count")  FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count")  FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("countError")  FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("countError") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("rb") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter
SELECT max("sb") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT sum("error") / sum("all") FROM (SELECT sum("count") AS "all" FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE "transaction" = 'all' AND "application" = '$application' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)), (SELECT sum("countError") AS "error" FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE "transaction" = 'all' AND "application" = '$application' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null))
SELECT mean("count") / $send_interval FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("countError") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("maxAT") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'internal' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("pct95.0") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction", time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("sb") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction", time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("rb") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction", time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT sum("count") as "# Samples", min(min) as Min, mean(avg) as Avg, percentile("pct50.0", 50) as pct50, percentile("pct90.0", 90) as pct90, percentile("pct95.0", 95) as pct95, percentile("pct99.0", 99) as pct99, max(max) as Max FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE "statut"='all' AND $timeFilter AND transaction !~ /all/ AND "application" =~ /$application/ GROUP BY "transaction"
SELECT sum("count") as "Error" FROM  "$measurement_name" WHERE $timeFilter AND "statut"='ko' AND "application" =~ /$application/ GROUP BY "transaction"
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ko') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "responseCode" !~ /^$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction","responseCode","responseMessage"

SELECT sum(count) FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "responseCode" !~ /^$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "responseCode", "responseMessage", "transaction", time($__interval)
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ko') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ko') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT sum("error") / sum("all") 
FROM (
    SELECT sum("count") AS "all" 
    FROM "$measurement_name" 
    WHERE "transaction" =~ /$transaction/ 
    AND "statut" = 'all' 
    AND "application" = '$application' 
    AND $timeFilter 
    GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
), (
    SELECT sum("count") AS "error" 
    FROM "$measurement_name" 
    WHERE "transaction" =~ /$transaction/ 
    AND "statut" = 'ko' 
    AND "application" = '$application' 
    AND $timeFilter 
    GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
)
SELECT SUM("count") / $send_interval FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval)
SELECT SUM("count") / $send_interval FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ko') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval)
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ko' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("avg") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval)
SELECT last("pct50.0") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval)
SELECT last("pct90.0") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("pct95.0") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("pct99.0") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("max") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.title: Active threads / Throughput / Avg response time / Error count

targets.query: SELECT mean("count") / $send_interval FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("maxAT") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'internal' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("countError") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("avg") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "$measurement_name" WITH KEY = "application"
list.name: application

query.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "$measurement_name" WITH KEY = "application"

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "$measurement_name" WITH KEY = "transaction"  WHERE "application" = '$application'  AND "transaction" != 'internal' AND "transaction" != 'all'
list.name: transaction

query.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "$measurement_name" WITH KEY = "transaction"  WHERE "application" = '$application'  AND "transaction" != 'internal' AND "transaction" != 'all'

title: ShopLite — JMeter Performance
